versions.label: version1 - basic
versions.characterBrief: [Shiva] : divine male deity, serene meditative presence; ash-smeared skin; third eye closed or softly lit; matted hair with Ganga; serpent ornaments; rudraksha; minimal sacred attire; calm transcendent bearing.
versions.videoLock: [Shiva] : divine male deity, serene meditative presence; ash-smeared skin; third eye closed or softly lit; matted hair with Ganga; serpent ornaments; rudraksha; minimal sacred attire; calm transcendent bearing.

versions.label: version2 - cosmic ascetic
versions.characterBrief: [Shiva] : cosmic ascetic male; blue-grey skin (Neelkanth); crescent moon in hair; damru and trishul visible when relevant; tiger or deer skin drape; storm-lightning aura optional; still immense presence.
versions.videoLock: [Shiva] : cosmic ascetic male; blue-grey skin (Neelkanth); crescent moon in hair; damru and trishul visible when relevant; tiger or deer skin drape; storm-lightning aura optional; still immense presence.

versions.label: version3 - seated blessing
versions.characterBrief: [Shiva] : seated or standing blessing posture; gentle abhaya mudra; soft ash markings; composed eyes; flowing minimal fabric; sacred calm without theatrical rage.
versions.videoLock: [Shiva] : seated or standing blessing posture; gentle abhaya mudra; soft ash markings; composed eyes; flowing minimal fabric; sacred calm without theatrical rage.

versions.label: version1 - sacred bull
versions.characterBrief: [Nandi] : large sacred bull (Nandi); pale or white coat; strong hump; gentle devoted eyes; bell and flower garlands optional; bovine anatomy only—no anthropomorphic deity face; calm strength beside Mahadev.
versions.videoLock: [Nandi] : large sacred bull (Nandi); pale or white coat; strong hump; gentle devoted eyes; bell and flower garlands optional; bovine anatomy only—no anthropomorphic deity face; calm strength beside Mahadev.

versions.label: version2 - decorated mount
versions.characterBrief: [Nandi] : richly decorated mount; vermilion and sandalwood marks; cloth over back; brass bell; regal but gentle; clear separation from human-form deities.
versions.videoLock: [Nandi] : richly decorated mount; vermilion and sandalwood marks; cloth over back; brass bell; regal but gentle; clear separation from human-form deities.

versions.label: version1 - youthful flute
versions.characterBrief: [Krishna] : divine youth; peacock feather crown; warm luminous skin; gentle smile; bansuri (flute) when relevant; yellow or gold dhoti; soft pastoral divine charm; serene profile readable.
versions.videoLock: [Krishna] : divine youth; peacock feather crown; warm luminous skin; gentle smile; bansuri (flute) when relevant; yellow or gold dhoti; soft pastoral divine charm; serene profile readable.

versions.label: version2 - royal counsel
versions.characterBrief: [Krishna] : regal bearing; jewelled crown; silk angavastram; discus hint optional; composed adult divine presence; wise calm eyes.
versions.videoLock: [Krishna] : regal bearing; jewelled crown; silk angavastram; discus hint optional; composed adult divine presence; wise calm eyes.

versions.label: version1 - flying warrior
versions.characterBrief: [Hanuman] : divine monkey-faced warrior; noble simian features with human-like dignity; muscular build; gada (mace) visible; short controlled facial fur; saffron or red dhoti; tail disciplined; golden-red aura optional; devotional courage.
versions.videoLock: [Hanuman] : divine monkey-faced warrior; noble simian features with human-like dignity; muscular build; gada (mace) visible; short controlled facial fur; saffron or red dhoti; tail disciplined; golden-red aura optional; devotional courage.

versions.label: version2 - kneeling devotion
versions.characterBrief: [Hanuman] : kneeling or standing devotion; folded hands; softer gaze; gada resting; humble strength; warm earth tones.
versions.videoLock: [Hanuman] : kneeling or standing devotion; folded hands; softer gaze; gada resting; humble strength; warm earth tones.

versions.label: version1 - blessing
versions.characterBrief: [Ganesha] : elephant-headed deity; kind intelligent eyes; modak or plate optional; silk dhoti; ornate crown; rounded divine proportions; warm lamp-friendly skin tones; gentle blessing mudra.
versions.videoLock: [Ganesha] : elephant-headed deity; kind intelligent eyes; modak or plate optional; silk dhoti; ornate crown; rounded divine proportions; warm lamp-friendly skin tones; gentle blessing mudra.

versions.label: version2 - festive
versions.characterBrief: [Ganesha] : festive adornment; flower garlands; gold ornaments; joyful calm expression; rich reds and golds; celebratory but dignified.
versions.videoLock: [Ganesha] : festive adornment; flower garlands; gold ornaments; joyful calm expression; rich reds and golds; celebratory but dignified.

versions.label: version1 - lion mount
versions.characterBrief: [Durga] : warrior goddess; multiple arms when depicted; trident and bow hints optional; fierce-calm expression; lion as mount or beside; rich saree and armour jewellery; strong silhouette against sky.
versions.videoLock: [Durga] : warrior goddess; multiple arms when depicted; trident and bow hints optional; fierce-calm expression; lion as mount or beside; rich saree and armour jewellery; strong silhouette against sky.

versions.label: version2 - serene power
versions.characterBrief: [Durga] : composed victorious stance; softer jewellery; lion at rest; controlled radiance; protective mother-energy without losing strength.
versions.videoLock: [Durga] : composed victorious stance; softer jewellery; lion at rest; controlled radiance; protective mother-energy without losing strength.

versions.label: version1 - gentle queen
versions.characterBrief: [Parvati] : divine queenly presence; warm luminous skin; refined sari; graceful jewellery; bindi or tilak; compassionate eyes; serene strength beside Shiva when paired.
versions.videoLock: [Parvati] : divine queenly presence; warm luminous skin; refined sari; graceful jewellery; bindi or tilak; compassionate eyes; serene strength beside Shiva when paired.

versions.label: version1 - dharmic prince
versions.characterBrief: [Ram] : dharmic prince; tall composed build; vertical tilak; simple forest or royal attire per scene; bow optional; calm righteous bearing; warm skin undertone.
versions.videoLock: [Ram] : dharmic prince; tall composed build; vertical tilak; simple forest or royal attire per scene; bow optional; calm righteous bearing; warm skin undertone.

versions.label: version1 - forest grace
versions.characterBrief: [Sita] : dignified queen in modest forest exile; simple sari; graceful posture; calm compassionate eyes; minimal jewellery; warm natural skin tone; serene strength beside Ram when paired.
versions.videoLock: [Sita] : dignified queen in modest forest exile; simple sari; graceful posture; calm compassionate eyes; minimal jewellery; warm natural skin tone; serene strength beside Ram when paired.

versions.label: version1 - youthful commander
versions.characterBrief: [Kartikeya] : divine youth commander; spear (vel) optional; minimal crown; confident calm stance; radiant warrior grace without brutality.
versions.videoLock: [Kartikeya] : divine youth commander; spear (vel) optional; minimal crown; confident calm stance; radiant warrior grace without brutality.

versions.label: version1 - lotus grace
versions.characterBrief: [Lakshmi] : goddess of fortune; lotus motifs; gold and vermillion palette; serene benevolent smile; refined ornaments; seated or standing grace; warm soft light on skin.
versions.videoLock: [Lakshmi] : goddess of fortune; lotus motifs; gold and vermillion palette; serene benevolent smile; refined ornaments; seated or standing grace; warm soft light on skin.
